title: Compliance scans including remediation-backups distort active violation baselines
description: Error-handling scanner runs that include ~REPORTS/remediation-backups re-import historical snapshots and inflate violation totals, masking current remediation progress and causing false non-regression interpretations. This is advisory because backup folders are valuable for rollback but should be excluded from active baseline scans.
detection_method: Scan configuration review and report trend comparison
preventionRule: Exclude remediation-backups from default scanner scope and report scope metadata for each run.
remedy: Add 'remediation-backups' to scanner exclusion lists and keep backup scans separate from active baseline scans.
